data.body: Reconciler sweep landed (commit 2341d628). Plan-review PASS (0 blocking, 1 advisory, 4 indeterminate), signed serially at the commit. Characterization tests for is_not_found/http_status added FIRST (6 tests, pin status_code-over-code precedence, non-int->None, only-404). All 20 broad-excepts to floor with justified noqa, ZERO behavior change: 8 cleanup-and-reraise (incl. 3 BaseException kept since they re-raise), 4 rollback-must-not-mask-original, 8 fail-open. Prints kept (operational subprocess output, T201 retained, BLE001 removed). Code-review subagent (general-purpose recommended going forward; this used Explore): clean — verified BaseException re-raises, rollback-no-mask, behavior preservation. Reconciler unit suite 977 pass; full suite 3215 passed/13 skipped run ALONE (serialized), HEAD stable. make lint green.
